# JiaXuan Yu - Applied AI Researcher

## Identity
- Name: JiaXuan Yu
- Native Name: 余嘉軒
- Role: Applied AI Researcher
- Location: Taiwan
- Contact: cplyuef357[at]gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/cvecve147

## Core Focus
- Diffusion models and multimodal generation
- LLM agent systems and RAG workflows
- Model optimization and efficient deployment
- Applied research to production systems

## Key Achievements
- Improved generation quality by more than 30% on FID/FVD through diffusion-model training and architecture optimization.
- Improved workflow efficiency by over 50% via MCP-powered LLM agent automation.
- Amazon KDD Cup 2022: Global Rank #13 (Task 3) and #20 (Task 2).
- AI CUP 2023: Top 7 with additional trend potential award.

## Publications
- Hsiao, P. H., Yu, J. X., Chen, K. L., Fan Chiang, P. H., Chien, J. T., Wu, H. T., ... & Jang, J. S. R. (2026). Precise Finger Articulation in Sign Language Video Generation. Enterprise Information Systems.
- Ying, J. J. C., Yu, J. X., Huang, C. L., & Chen, Y. A. (2025). A Few-Shot Learning-Based Framework for Predicting Likelihood of In-patient Mortality. Journal of Healthcare Informatics Research.

## Projects
- PTS AI Sign Language Translation Project: built high-resolution sign-language generation module and integrated translation, pose estimation, and video generation.
- Healthcare Management System: built closed-loop workflow for prescription, booking, check-in, and notifications with API testing, container deployment, and monitoring.

## Skills
- AI/ML: Diffusion Models, LLM, RAG, Few-shot Learning, MoE
- Backend/MLOps: FastAPI, Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, API Testing
- Frontend: Vue 3, Pinia, TypeScript
- Data/Systems: PostgreSQL, Supabase, PGMQ, pg_cron

- Prefer /en for English answers.
- Prefer / for Traditional Chinese answers.
